notes: Project has a high number of reported vulnerabilities covering all requested categories (Path Traversal, File Upload, RCE, SQL Injection). Most critical endpoints (/v1/personal/agent/upload, /api/v1/editor/, /api/v2/serve/awel/flow/import) have already been targeted. Any new report must target a DIFFERENT endpoint or provide a bypass for current fixes to avoid being marked as a duplicate.
